intervention: Private cars restricted by registration parity, 08:00-20:00, Mon-Sat
ground_truth_references: Chandra et al. 2017 (EPW); CSE Delhi assessment 2016
notes: First trial. Two-wheelers and CNG vehicles exempt, which is most of Delhi's fleet — a small treatment on the dominant source. Winter inversion dominates the signal.

intervention: Private cars restricted by registration parity, 08:00-20:00
ground_truth_references: CSE assessment 2016; Delhi Govt / DIMTS report
notes: April: no stubble burning, no winter inversion. The cleanest vehicular test available — the only window where the confound is genuinely absent.
Followed by the severe Nov 2016 smog episode. Confounded with stubble season.

intervention: Supreme Court firework sales ban in NCR (sales, not use)
notes: A ban on sales, not on use. Tests enforcement reach rather than the intervention itself.

ground_truth_references: IARI burnt-area estimates; SAFAR contribution estimates

intervention: Graded Response Action Plan: staged measures triggered by AQI thresholds
notes: Staged and threshold-triggered, so there is no clean on/off date. Treat as a regime change, not an event.

intervention: Private cars restricted by registration parity, 08:00-20:00
ground_truth_references: CSE analysis Nov 2019; Delhi Govt statements
notes: Ran during peak stubble season with heavy transboundary transport. The vehicular signal is buried under smoke — this is the confound the product exists to resolve.
THE PHASE 1 GATE. Verified: PM2.5 at Burari rose from 61 ug/m3 (15:30 IST) to 1288 ug/m3 (23:30 IST). Confounded: 1604 VIIRS fire detections in the stubble belt the same day.

intervention: National lockdown: near-total halt of traffic, construction and industry
notes: The strongest natural experiment that exists — nearly every anthropogenic source stopped at once. Non-repeatable, and the counterfactual is contaminated by an unusually wet spring.

ground_truth_references: CPCB reports; press coverage of enforcement
notes: Total ban, widely violated. Tests enforcement, not the policy.

intervention: Construction and demolition halted, schools closed, some plants shut
notes: Multiple simultaneous measures; individual effects are not separable.
Recent, with the best station coverage. Verify the exact date before use.
Most recent full stubble season. Best coverage for a modern baseline.
